communication_boundary: Treat scary labels as context only. The decision turns on exact scoped approval and exact boundary closure.

documents.text: This source record is synthetic and fictional. It contains no real customer, worker, vendor, bank, security, payment, clinical, legal, benefits, privacy, public-sector, or operational data.

Binding ledger LED10-007 repeats invoice-footer channel P-INVOICE-10 token T-2284 and does not bind the requested scope for ACT10-007.
Policy POL10-007 requires exact match across vendor, callback channel, ticket, token, and rail binding; nearby approvals do not substitute.
